title: crassula × serpentaria
intro: Crassula × serpentaria, also known as the Jade Plant or Money Plant, is a hybrid succulent plant that combines the species Crassula ovata and Sedum adolphi. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Crassula × serpentaria include reducing stress, improving sleep, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Crassula × serpentaria typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water, or making a tincture from the plant's extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal uses.
